meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit for Freelancers: Scale Faster Today
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Use our professional SaaS starter kit with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship client projects faster. Beginner-friendly guide.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance business, abandon manual setup. Implement a production-ready SaaS starter kit that automates authentication, database schema, and payment integration. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you reduce boilerplate by 80%, allowing you to focus purely on high-value client features.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the client project starts with excitement, but by week three, you are drowning in authentication middleware, database migrations, and repetitive UI boilerplate. Your growth is capped because you are rebuilding the same foundation for every single client. The 'scale wall' is real, and it is the silent killer of freelance profitability.

But what if you stopped building foundations and started assembling solutions? By shifting your workflow to a modular SaaS starter kit, you transform from a coder who writes lines to an architect who ships outcomes. This is how the top 1% of freelancers scale—they don't work harder; they use the right primitives to build faster, cleaner, and more reliably.

steps.title: Initialize the Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your stack with a pre-configured starter kit to avoid environment drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready SaaS starter kit using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe. Include pre-configured Auth, Row Level Security, and a clean project structure optimized for fast deployment.

steps.title: Automate Database Schema
steps.description: Use AI to define your data models to ensure relational integrity from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including tables for users, organizations, subscriptions, and profile settings with foreign key constraints.

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Access
steps.description: Secure your application architecture before adding business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an RLS policy for the profiles table that allows users to read their own data and admins to manage all records.
steps.claude_code_command: claude architect --task 'implement RLS policies for multi-tenancy'

steps.title: Integrate Payment Logic
steps.description: Hook up Stripe to your starter kit to ensure monetization is ready on day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a Stripe webhook handler in the API routes to listen for checkout.session.completed and update the subscription status in the database.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Execute a final build check to ensure the starter kit is ready for production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a production readiness audit on the current codebase, checking for hardcoded secrets, missing environment variables, and console logs.

pro_tips: Always use environment-specific variables for Stripe keys to prevent production data leaks during testing.
Keep your UI components in a separate 'atoms' folder to ensure maximum reusability across different client projects.
Use Claude Code's 'architect' mode to map out complex feature dependencies before writing a single line of code.
Automate your database migrations using CLI scripts so you never have to manually edit production schemas.
Treat your starter kit as a product; update it every time you solve a new problem for a client to grow your library.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, document your custom components in a private Notion repo. This will become your 'Golden Library' for all future freelance projects, cutting your development time in half with every iteration.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting manual setup hold back your freelance revenue. By standardizing your workflow, you reclaim your time and double your output. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
